name: CORPAY, INC.
business: Corpay is a global corporate payments company that helps businesses and consumers better manage and pay their expenses. It provides payment and spend management solutions including AP automation, cross-border payments, commercial cards, vehicle payments, and lodging payments.
sellsTo: Partners (e.g., financial institutions, oil companies, fuel merchants)

exposures.sentence: Corpay is a global corporate payments company that helps businesses and consumers better manage and pay their expenses in a simple, controlled manner.
We are actively expanding our EV footprint to accommodate charging in the U.S., U.K. and Europe.
Corpay s spend management solution also incorporates advanced analytics, including artificial intelligence (AI) enabled capabilities, to enhance spend oversight and decision-making.

We may not be able to adequately protect our systems or the data we collect from continually evolving cybersecurity risks or other technological risks, which could subject us to liability and damage our reputation.
We offer a variety of auto insurance and roadside assistance services to our customer base through a physical sales channel with more than four million policies issued so far.
We may use our own proprietary network, SWIFT international payments network, and even stablecoins, to move liquidity around the world.

catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we acquired 100% of Gringo, a leading Brazil-based vehicle registration and compliance payment company, for approximately $153.7 million, net of cash of approximately $10.2 million.

catalysts.event: Expansion of strategic partnership with Mastercard and Mastercard investment in cross-border business
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we expanded our long-standing strategic partnership agreement with Mastercard to deliver an enhanced suite of corporate cross-border payment solutions.

catalysts.event: Formation of limited partnership with TPG to acquire AvidXchange
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we invested approximately $578 million for approximately 35% of the equity in the limited partnership with TPG for an enterprise valuation of approximately $1.9 billion.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Alpha Group International plc
catalysts.sentence: On October 31, 2025, we completed the acquisition of all of the ordinary shares of Alpha for 42.50 in cash for each Alpha share upon the terms as described in the Rule 2.7 Announcement, resulting in an aggregate purchase price of approximately 1.8 billion, or $2.4 billion.

catalysts.event: Divestiture of BP private label fuel card portfolio
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we announced the divestiture of our BP private label fuel card portfolio for approximately $60 million.
On February 20, 2025, we entered into the sixteenth amendment to the Credit Agreement.

catalysts.event: Amendment to Credit Facility (seventeenth amendment) and funding of Alpha acquisition
catalysts.sentence: On November 5, 2025, we entered into the seventeenth amendment to the Credit Agreement.
On January 24, 2025, we entered into an omnibus amendment to various documents governing the Securitization Facility.

catalysts.event: Sixth Amended and Restated Receivables Purchase Agreement for Securitization Facility
catalysts.sentence: On November 3, 2025, we entered into the Sixth Amended and Restated Receivables Purchase Agreement (the 'RPA') in connection with the Securitization Facility.

catalysts.event: Potential put/call rights for Mastercard interest
catalysts.sentence: Mastercard has the right to sell, or put, its interest back to us for six months starting on August 1, 2027.

catalysts.event: Potential call right for Mastercard interest if put not exercised
catalysts.sentence: If Mastercard does not exercise that right, we will have a reciprocal repurchase, or call, right for six months starting on May 1, 2028.

catalysts.event: Option to acquire remaining AvidXchange partnership equity
catalysts.sentence: 33 months after the closing we will have the right to acquire all the remaining outstanding equity in the limited partnership for approximately 2.5 times invested capital.

catalysts.event: Signing of definitive agreement to sell PayByPhone
catalysts.sentence: Subsequently, in February 2026, we signed a definitive agreement to sell PayByPhone, a mobile parking payments business within our Vehicle Payments segment to a third party for $450 million.
The transaction is expected to close during the first half of 2026, subject to certain customary closing conditions.

catalysts.event: Enactment of One Big Beautiful Bill Act
catalysts.sentence: On July 4, 2025, the 'One Big Beautiful Bill Act' (the 'Act') was enacted in the U.S.

tamClaims.claim: Businesses spend approximately $145 trillion annually in transactions with other businesses.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that businesses spend approximately $145 trillion annually in transactions with other businesses.
